_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

capacity_rules.school_capacity_logic: If max_schools is set, booked_school_count + 1 must be <= max_schools.
capacity_rules.student_capacity_logic: If max_students is set, booked_student_count + confirmed_student_count must be <= max_students.
capacity_rules.race_condition_control: Booking transaction must re-check capacity immediately before insert/update.
capacity_rules.reschedule_capacity_rule: Reserve new slot and release old slot atomically, or fail safely.
